message:
Sync beads database export ordering after concurrent agent activity

Another agent ran `br sync --flush-only` concurrently, producing a
re-serialization of issues.jsonl with identical content but different
line ordering. No issues were added, removed, or modified — this is
purely a JSONL row reorder from the beads_rust export determinism.

13 lines changed position; 0 semantic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
